subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Fadl! Upon thee rest My glory! The All-Knowing God beareth witness, and the sun and moon do testify, that the Sovereign doeth whatsoever He willeth and the Lord... O Abu'l-Fadl! The Lord of Grace hath been and shall ever be with thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالفضل علیک بهائی حق آگاه آفتاب و ماه گواه که سلطان یفعل ما یشاء و مالک... يا ابا الفضل حضرت فضال با تو بوده و هست
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
